summary:
# 今日社区动态（MiniMax-M2.7 | 2026-02-26 ~ 2026-03-23）

- 🌐 [网络](#subsystem-%E7%BD%91%E7%BB%9C)：本期无显著新特性或性能优化，主要为清理、配置更新等低风险小修正。
- 📈 [维测](#subsystem-%E7%BB%B4%E6%B5%8B)：BPF/Tracing 密集增强——新增零扩展传播、边界条件、除 INT_MIN 等多个测试用例覆盖，同时修复子程序锁泄漏、sync_linked_regs 指令处理等 5 项 bug，显著提升 BPF 验证器的鲁棒性与问题可追溯性。
- 🗂 [文件系统与存储](#subsystem-%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%9F%E4%B8%8E%E5%AD%98%E5%82%A8)：本期无显著新特性或性能优化，主要为清理、配置更新等低风险小修正。
- 🏗 [体系结构](#subsystem-%E4%BD%93%E7%B3%BB%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%84)：本期无显著新特性或性能优化，主要为清理、配置更新等低风险小修正。
- 🧩 [IO_uring](#subsystem-IO_uring)：本期无显著新特性或性能优化，主要为清理、配置更新等低风险小修正。
- ⚙ [驱动](#subsystem-%E9%A9%B1%E5%8A%A8)：xe GPU 新增 OA 流禁用后仍可读取计数器的调试能力；修复 max6639 风扇转速计算、xe CCS 模式运行时 PM 引用、cp2615 空指针解引用等多处设备驱动 bug，整体为功能性完善。

## 网络
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=7ab4a7c5d969642782b8a5b608da0dd02aa9f229) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=614aefe56af8e13331e50220c936fc0689cf5675) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=b48731849609cbd8c53785a48976850b443153fd) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=d75ec7e8ba1979a1eb0b9211d94d749cdce849c8) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=0f9ea7141f365b4f27226898e62220fb98ef8dc6)

## 维测
- `feature` selftests/bpf: 添加 BPF 异常中 bpf_throw 在子程序场景的锁泄漏测试用例 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=a1e5c46eaed3151be93e1aec9af0d8f8db79b8f6)
- `feature` selftests/bpf: 添加 sync_linked_regs 对零扩展传播的测试用例 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=4a04d13576fd69149b91672b5f1dc62eca272fa5)
- `feature` selftests/bpf: 添加 maybe_fork_scalars() 中 OR 与 AND 操作的边界测试 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=0ad1734cc5598d3ddb6126a8960efe85f0f807d7)
- `feature` selftests/bpf: 添加 sdiv32/smod32 对 INT_MIN 被除数的边界测试 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=4ac95c65efeaf0c010199b2b2f5f78b06f28dab6)
- `bugfix` bpf: 修复子程序异常退出时锁检查逻辑，补充相关测试覆盖 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=6c2128505f61b504c79a20b89596feba61388112)
- `bugfix` bpf: 修复 sync_linked_regs 中 BPF_ADD_CONST32 指令的零扩展传播问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=bc308be380c136800e1e94c6ce49cb53141d6506)
- `bugfix` bpf: 修复 maybe_fork_scalars() 处理 BPF_OR 时标量分支不健全的问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=c845894ebd6fb43226b3118d6b017942550910c5)
- `bugfix` bpf: 修复解释器对 INT_MIN 进行除法/取模运算时的未定义行为 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=c77b30bd1dcb61f66c640ff7d2757816210c7cb0)
- `bugfix` ring-buffer: 修复持久化环形缓冲区中子缓冲区条目的更新逻辑 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=f35dbac6942171dc4ce9398d1d216a59224590a9)
- `bugfix` tracing: 修复 trace_marker 操作时链表更新不一致的问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=07183aac4a6828e474f00b37c9d795d0d99e18a7)
- `bugfix` tracing: 修复系统调用跟踪事件读取用户空间数据失败的问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=edca33a56297d5741ccf867669debec116681987)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=50b35c9e50a865600344ab1d8f9a8b3384d7e63d)

## 文件系统与存储
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=e6d7eba23b666d85cacee0643be280d6ce1ebffc) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=23b5df09c27aec13962b30d32a4167ebdd043f8e)

## 体系结构
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=63f8b60151dc00895137bfadc987f258060ab264) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=8c6e9b60f5c7985a9fe41320556a92d7a33451df) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=1f6aa5bbf1d0f81a8a2aafc16136e7dd9a609ff3)

## IO_uring
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=418eab7a6f3c002d8e64d6e95ec27118017019af) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=3ecd3e03144b38a21a3b70254f1b9d2e16629b09)

## 驱动
- `feature` 允许 xe GPU OA 流禁用后仍可读取计数器数据，提升调试灵活性 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=9be6fd9fbd2032b683e51374497768af9aaa228a)
- `bugfix` 修复 max6639 转速计脉冲数计算错误，确保风扇转速读取准确性 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=e7bae9a7a5e1251ab414291f4e9304d702bb9221)
- `bugfix` 修复 xe GPU CCS 模式存储时运行时 PM 引用缺失问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=65d046b2d8e0d6d855379a981869005fd6b6a41b)
- `bugfix` 修复 xe GPU 上下文时间戳捕获时 new_ts 未初始化问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=e6e3ea52bf07a0b7b9dff189616f189b83ee397a)
- `bugfix` 修复 cp2615 I2C 适配器探测时串行字符串空指针解引用问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=aa79f996eb41e95aed85a1bd7f56bcd6a3842008)
- `bugfix` 修复 fsi I2C 总线驱动探测函数中的资源泄漏问题 [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=be627abcc0d5dbd5882873bd85fbc18aa3d189ed)
- `other` 其他改动多为小修正、清理或配置更新，整体风险较低，详情见：[↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=01f2557aa684e514005541e71a3d01f4cd45c170) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=7838dd8367419e9fc43b79c038321cb3c04de2a2) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=e0f82655df6fbb15b318e9d56724cd54b1cfb04d) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=fb3738693cbdce104bf12615e980a6a37ff9087d) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=26c638d5602e329e0b26281a74c6ec69dee12f23) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=38b8dcde231641f00eee977d245dbfe5f6b06e11) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=ec69c9e88315c4be70c283f18c2ff130da6320b5) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=9b72283ec9b8685acdb3467de8fbc3352fdb70bb) [↗](https://git.kernel.org/pub/scm/linux/kernel/git/torvalds/linux.git/commit/?id=78a6ee14f8b9e1c8f7c77612122444f3be8dc8cc)

## 其他
本次共有2个补丁，主要涉及Makefile和include/trace目录的改动，主要更新了构建配置和追踪子系统相关的头文件。
未匹配到固定子系统规则的改动共 2 条，建议后续按需要补充目录规则以提升归类精度。
标签统计：`feature` 0 / `bugfix` 0 / `other` 2 / `perf` 0。
